chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-3347 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 19260/2023 2. For hearing of CMA No. 15782/2023 (stay) 3. For hearing of main case 12-02-2025 Mr. Moulvi Iqbal Haider, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh The petitioners seek regularization of employment in a Government department upon assertion of having rendered contingent / contractual services, asserted to be long since terminated. Learned counsel for the petitioners was asked to demonstrate any subsisting relationship / contract between the petitioners and the respondent, but he unable to do so. Learned counsel for the petitioners was also asked to demonstrate the law under which the regularization sought could be sanctioned; once again he remained unable to assist this Court. In mutatis mutandis application of the ratio illumined vide judgment of Supreme Court of Pakistan in Vice Chancellor Agriculture University Peshawar & Others vs. Muhammad Shafiq & Others reported as 2024 SCMR 527, Full bench of this Court in Muhammad Arif vs. Federation of Pakistan reported as P.L.C. (C.S) 93 and Division Bench of this Court in Mumtaz Ali Panhwar & Others vs. Province of Sindh & Others reported as 2024 P.L.C. (C.S) 1487 this petition is found to be not maintainable, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
